runtime_threshold_sweep.counterfactual_note: Thresholds are selected from runtime calibration risk scores. Test outcomes use paired direct_openpi episodes when a threshold would attempt, and a 10-step runtime-prefix abstention proxy when it would reject.
runtime_threshold_sweep.evaluation_type: paired runtime SigLIP risk scores with paired real direct OpenPI outcomes for accepted attempts

split.threshold_selection: target coverage thresholds selected only on calibration examples
